overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a coastal highway in GTA V, beginning with scenic ocean views, turning around to face oncoming traffic, and approaching a tunnel entrance. The clip features clear summer weather with moderate vehicle traffic and distinctive game-engine rendering.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway bridge with ocean overlook

events.description: camera pans left to focus on the sandy beach and ocean shoreline
camera begins 180-degree turn to face the opposite direction along the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder next to the guardrail, observing the coastal scenery and ocean views

entered.detail: concrete and metal safety barrier running along the left side of the highway
calm blue ocean water visible beyond the guardrail
sandy shoreline curving along the coast with gentle waves
grass-covered rocky hills rising on the inland side of the highway
multi-lane asphalt road with concrete barriers and lane markings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a scenic coastal highway view, the camera walking steadily along the shoulder with the ocean and beach visible to the left. The metal guardrail runs parallel to the path as the camera pans to admire the shoreline, then begins turning around to face the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane highway with active vehicle traffic

events.description: camera completes 180-degree turn, now facing oncoming traffic direction with mountains on the left
black SUV and sedan pass by in the adjacent lane

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder against the flow of traffic, observing passing vehicles

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past the camera in the left lane
sedan approaching from the distance in the right lane

entered.detail: large rocky mountain formation with sparse vegetation visible in the distance
yellow safety posts lining the right edge of the highway

segments.scene_description: Having turned around, the camera now walks along the highway facing oncoming traffic, with the metal guardrail now on the right. Vehicles including SUVs and sedans pass by regularly as the road stretches ahead toward distant mountains, with yellow safety bollards marking the roadside.

events.description: tunnel entrance becomes visible in the distance ahead, marking the end of the open coastal section
motorcyclist rides past on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: continuing toward the tunnel entrance as various vehicles pass by on the road

notable_agents.action: motorcyclist riding past the camera on the right shoulder
black truck entering the tunnel ahead

entered.detail: dark tunnel opening in the highway ahead, cutting through the mountain
small white structure with red roof visible on the hillside to the right

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a tunnel entrance that grows progressively larger in the frame. The highway continues straight toward the dark tunnel opening while vehicles including a motorcyclist and trucks pass by. The metal guardrail remains on the right as the camera walks steadily toward the tunnel threshold.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a coastal highway that shifts from a scenic ocean vista to a direct approach toward a dark tunnel. It begins with the camera walking along the shoulder, panning left to admire the beach and ocean beyond a metal guardrail before steadily turning around to face the opposite direction. As the perspective shifts, the camera moves forward against the flow of traffic, passing SUVs and sedans while the road stretches toward distant mountains marked by yellow safety bollards. The scene then narrows its focus as the highway leads straight toward a looming tunnel entrance that grows progressively larger in the frame. Finally, the camera continues its steady pace past motorcyclists and trucks, moving closer to the dark threshold of the tunnel with the guardrail remaining to the right.
